description: Base player movement speed in px/sec (before Swift Boots / Moonwalker multipliers)
Magic Wand base damage at Lv1 (wiki base 10); per-level bonus_damage/amount/pierce/cooldown live in data/magic_wand_levels.csv
Garlic base damage at Lv1 (wiki base 5); per-level bonus_damage/area/cooldown live in data/garlic_levels.csv
Whip base damage at Lv1 (wiki base 10); per-level bonus_damage/projectiles/area live in data/whip_levels.csv
King Bible base damage at Lv1 (wiki base 10); per-level bonus_damage/amount/area/speed live in data/king_bible_levels.csv
Lightning Ring base damage at Lv1 (wiki base 15); per-level bonus_damage/amount/area live in data/lightning_levels.csv
Knife base damage before any levels
Runetracer base damage before any levels (per-level growth lives in data/runetracer_levels.csv)
Fire Wand base damage before any levels (per-level growth lives in data/fire_wand_levels.csv)
Whip cooldown between swings (seconds; does not scale per level)
King Bible min seconds between a book's hits (does not scale per level)
Lightning Ring base cooldown between volleys before any levels
Lightning Ring cooldown shrink per level (floored at lightning_min_interval)
Lightning Ring cooldown floor — the volley cadence never drops below this many seconds no matter how many levels shrink it (keeps it a burst weapon
Knife cooldown between volley throws (seconds; per wiki does not scale per level — only the intra-volley proj_interval tightens on L4/6/8
Runetracer base cooldown between volleys before any levels
Runetracer cooldown shrink per level (floored at runetracer_min_interval)
Runetracer cooldown floor — the volley cadence never drops below this many seconds no matter how many levels shrink it
Fire Wand base cooldown between volleys before any levels
Fire Wand cooldown shrink per level (floored at fire_wand_min_interval)
Fire Wand cooldown floor — the volley cadence never drops below this many seconds no matter how many levels shrink it
Enemy max HP at/below which a kill has only the floor chance to drop an XP gem
Floor chance (0-1) an XP gem drops from a kill at/below gem_drop_floor_hp
Enemy max HP at/above which a kill is guaranteed (100%) to drop an XP gem
Camera zoom factor for the whole run (less than 1 zooms out so everything reads smaller; greater than 1 zooms in)
Scale multiplier for the player avatar; scales both the sprite and the contact hitbox radius by the same factor (1 = native art size / tuned baseline hitbox)
Global scale multiplier applied on top of each enemy type's own scale (1 = per-type size); scales both the sprite and the collision radius by the same factor
Mantis Warrior base scale before the global enemy_scale multiplier; scales both the sprite and the collision radius (1.4 = the tuned baseline hitbox)
Elite mini-boss base scale before the global enemy_scale multiplier; scales both the sprite and the collision radius (2.0 = the tuned baseline hitbox)
Reaper finale base scale before the global enemy_scale multiplier; scales both the sprite and the collision radius (2.6 = the tuned baseline hitbox)
Glow Bat mini-boss base scale before the global enemy_scale multiplier; scales both the sprite and the collision radius (1.5 = the tuned baseline hitbox)

Scale multiplier for flying projectile sprites — the dagger bolts thrown by Knife and fired by the Magic Wand; scales both the sprite and the hit radius by the same factor (1 = native art size / tuned baseline hit radius)
Survival goal in seconds — outlast the escalating waves to this many seconds and the run is WON (Mad Forest 30:00); the single knob to tune the run length
Extra seconds the player must outlast the summoned finale Reaper after run_duration before the win lands
Gilded Clover Gold Fever window length in seconds during which kills can drop bonus gold
Chance (0-1) a kill drops an extra Gold Coin while a Gold Fever is active (Gilded_Clover.md 75%)
Fraction of the next level's XP requirement granted when a level-up is Skipped (GDD forgo-for-partial-XP)
Gold banked by the "Gold" consolation level-up card (padded when the upgrade pool is maxed)
Gold banked by the larger "Gold Sack" consolation level-up card
HP healed by the "Roast Chicken" consolation level-up card (GDD Floor Chicken heals 30 HP)
Added crit chance per +1% Luck bonus (~+5% crit per Little Clover); base weapons have no native crit
Maximum crit chance so crits stay a spike
Damage multiplier applied on a critical hit
Per-hit base-damage variance (+/- fraction) rolled before per-level growth and Might multipliers (Damage.md)
Inventory cap on owned weapons — the level-up roll stops offering a 7th weapon (GDD 6 weapons + 6 passives)
Inventory cap on owned passive items — the level-up roll stops offering a 7th passive (GDD 6 weapons + 6 passives)
